stories.headline: Strategy stockpile hits 818,334 BTC at $62B cost basis, ~3.9% of supply
stories.tldr: Saylor's Strategy now holds 818,334 BTC bought for nearly $62 billion at an average $75,537 per coin, the largest corporate stash ever.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A single public company has absorbed almost 4% of bitcoin's circulating supply, anchoring spot demand even as ETF flows cool.
the_details: Average cost basis $75,537 per BTC, currently in the money with spot near $78,100.
Bitmine now holds over 5 million ETH after a 10-month sprint, while most digital asset treasuries have stopped accumulating.
Concentration risk grows as corporate buyers replace retail and miners as marginal demand.

stories.headline: SEC schedules CLARITY Act roundtable to settle SEC vs. CFTC crypto turf war
stories.tldr: The SEC has officially scheduled a CLARITY Act roundtable to define which regulator oversees digital assets and lay out a US market framework.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: This could end seven years of jurisdictional whiplash and unlock listings, custody, and clearing decisions that have been on ice.
the_details: Builds on the March 17 SEC-CFTC 68-page joint interpretive release that supersedes the 2019 Framework.
Coalition of 100+ firms including Coinbase and Ripple is pushing the Senate Banking Committee to mark up CLARITY now.
Stablecoin rulemaking under the GENIUS Act is moving in parallel, with FDIC NPRM for permitted payment issuers.

stories.headline: Spot Solana ETF inflows crater 92% to $34M as treasury bid evaporates
stories.tldr: Spot Solana ETF inflows have collapsed from $419M in November 2025 to just $34M in April 2026 as SOL hovers near $86.50.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: SOL was the marquee post-BTC ETF launch; cooling demand here weakens the bull case for a wider altcoin ETF wave in 2026.
the_details: Solana market cap sits near $49.8B, ranking 7th by total value.
Agave 4.1 client targeting Q3 2026 testnet, mainnet finality cut to 100-150ms slated for Q4.
Tokamak Network bucked the tape with a 15.65% rip on April 27, taking the #4 Upbit volume spot.

stories.headline: Aave plants flag on Solana via Sunrise DeFi, redirecting $14.7B TVL strategy
stories.tldr: Aave has launched on Solana through Sunrise DeFi, routing Ethereum-backed liquidity into faster, cheaper execution on the SVM.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The largest lending protocol going multi-VM signals that Ethereum-only DeFi is officially over — even for blue chips.
the_details: Inflows so far reflect repositioning from existing Aave users, not net new capital.
Aave's $14.7B TVL is the benchmark every other money market is now chasing onto Solana.
Move pressures Solend, MarginFi, and Kamino to defend share against a battle-tested incumbent.

stories.headline: Bhutan moves another 250 BTC; 2026 outflows now top $240M, holdings down 73%
stories.tldr: Bhutan moved 250 BTC on April 13, pushing 2026 outflows past $240M as the country's stash sits 73% below its October 2024 peak.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A sovereign holder quietly distributing into rallies is a structurally bearish counter to the Strategy accumulation narrative.
the_details: Outflows tracked on-chain by Arkham Intelligence across 2026 transfers.
Bhutan was once a marquee sovereign bitcoin miner; current treasury thesis is unclear.
Block (XYZ) holds 8,780 BTC at $674.3M; XXI (CEP) holds 43,514 BTC at $3.28B for context.
